title: armeria maritima var. castellana
intro: Armeria maritima var. castellana, also known as Castilian sea thrift, is a type of flowering plant in the plantain family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Castilian sea thrift include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
